dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6204 IH: Large-Scale Water Recycling Reauthorization Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Lee of Nevada (for herself and Mr. Ciscomani) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Natural Resources

form.official-title: To extend the authorization for a large-scale water recycling and reuse grant program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Large-Scale Water Recycling Reauthorization Act.
Section 40905(k) of the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (Public Law 117–58) is amended by striking 5 years and inserting 10 years.
